daily: As the Supreme Court closed its 2025–26 term in late June 2026, how many major rulings related to President Trump went against him versus in his favor, and what were the vote counts in the FTC Rebecca Slaughter and Federal Reserve Lisa Cook cases?
headline_seed: Supreme Court final opinions June 2026 — Trump 3-1 on FTC firing, Lisa Cook, mail-in ballots, E. Jean Carroll
